sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 100:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 100:1
items.html: It is the phase of Keter of the five phases of light of Hassadim, since KHB of the light of Hassadim is called HGT. (Inner Light, Item‎ 40)
